message:
feat: integrate react-grab with Claude Code for UI element selection

Add react-grab scripts to enable selecting UI elements and sending
context directly to Claude Code for editing.

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "type": "module",
   "scripts": {
-    "dev": "bash ../../scripts/check-and-migrate.sh && bun run cf-typegen && vite dev",
+    "dev": "bash ../../scripts/check-and-migrate.sh && bun run cf-typegen && npx @react-grab/claude-code@latest && vite dev",
     "dev:test": "VITE_USE_TEST_DB=true bun run cf-typegen && vite dev",
     "dev:wrangler": "wrangler dev --local --log-level=debug",
     "build": "vite build && tsc --noEmit",

@@ -62,6 +62,12 @@ function RootDocument({ children }: Readonly<{ children: ReactNode }>) {
     <html>
       <head>
         <HeadContent />
+        {import.meta.env.DEV && (
+          <>
+            <script src="//unpkg.com/react-grab/dist/index.global.js" crossOrigin="anonymous" />
+            <script src="//unpkg.com/@react-grab/claude-code/dist/client.global.js" crossOrigin="anonymous" />
+          </>
+        )}
       </head>
       <body>
         {children}
